ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., RB, QB) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 5'10") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "contract_expiration_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  "current_team_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the current team */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams the player has played for */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* Notable career achievements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Team's mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "number_of_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "total_gain" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "total_loss" INTEGER /* Total yards lost */,
  "net_yards" INTEGER /* Net yards (total gain - total loss) */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "longest_rush" INTEGER /* Longest rush in yards */,
  "average_yards_per_carry" REAL /* Average yards per carry */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "longest_touchdown_run" INTEGER /* Longest touchdown run */,
  "breaking_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles broken */,
  "yards_after_contact" INTEGER /* Number of yards gained after contact */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees officiating the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "stadium_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the stadium */,
  "stadium_location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the stadium */,
  "stadium_webcam_url" TEXT /* URL of the stadium's webcam */,
  "stadium_capacity_details" TEXT /* Details about the seating capacity (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous coaching experience */,
  "coach_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Coach's Twitter handle */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Coach's email address */,
  "coach_phone_number" TEXT /* Coach's phone number */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "general_managers" (
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each general manager */,
  "gm_name" TEXT /* Full name of the general manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the general manager is associated with */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the general manager was hired */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous general manager experience */,
  "gm_twitter_handle" TEXT /* General manager's Twitter handle */,
  "gm_email" TEXT /* General manager's email address */,
  "gm_phone_number" TEXT /* General manager's phone number */,
  "gm_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_general_managers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for intermediate, 3 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "user_twitter_handle" TEXT /* User's Twitter handle */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., Player, Game, Team) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., RB, QB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_requirements" TEXT /* Physical and skill requirements for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event occurred in */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Touchdown, Interception) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event during the game */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location on the field where the event occurred */,
  "event_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video clip of the event */,
  "event_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the game (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league during the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "top_scorer_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top scorer in the season */,
  "top_rusher_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top rusher in the season */,
  "season_highlights" TEXT /* Notable highlights of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_rusher_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_rusher_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
